thesis: A cheap, liquid large-cap where analyst revisions are strongly rising and price momentum is turning up; classic value-plus-revision re-rating candidate that fits a lower-beta hybrid.
falsification: Crude weakens and ONGC's revisions roll over (analysts start cutting) with momentum turning negative over the next quarter.

thesis: Iron-ore producer with strong rising revisions and improving momentum; a cyclical revision-led name to harvest the commodity up-cycle.
falsification: Steel/iron-ore demand softens, NMDC revisions turn down and momentum goes negative within two quarters.

thesis: Strong relative momentum and rising revisions in a cheap large-cap metal name; rides the same commodity revision tailwind as NMDC/HINDALCO.
falsification: Aluminium prices fall, momentum reverses and revisions fade over the next quarter.

thesis: Diversified large-cap metals play with rising revisions and positive momentum; anchors the materials sleeve.
falsification: Global metals demand and prices weaken, dragging momentum and revisions negative.

thesis: Cash-generative, cheap large-cap with rising revisions and steady momentum; defensive cyclical with a yield cushion.
falsification: Coal volumes/realizations fall, revisions turn down and the dividend thesis weakens over coming quarters.

thesis: A structural compounder (cement/VSF/paints optionality) where revisions are strongly rising; quality name that suits the hybrid identity.
falsification: Revisions fade and the new-business (paints) ramp disappoints, with momentum staying weak.

thesis: Cheap, dominant life insurer where analyst revisions are strongly rising; diversifies the financials sleeve beyond banks.
falsification: Revisions reverse, embedded-value growth disappoints, or momentum stays persistently negative over two quarters.

thesis: Gold-loan leader with strong rising revisions and a tailwind from elevated gold prices; durable franchise.
falsification: Gold prices fall sharply or regulatory tightening hits gold-loan economics; revisions turn down.

thesis: Specialty injectables franchise where revisions are strongly rising and momentum is positive; quality healthcare exposure.
falsification: FDA/regulatory setback or revisions roll over, with momentum reversing.

thesis: Diversified pharma with strongly rising revisions; adds a second quality healthcare name with revision support.
falsification: US generic pricing pressure resumes, revisions turn down and momentum fades.

thesis: Structural defence/explosives growth story with strongly rising revisions and good momentum; high-quality compounder.
falsification: Order-book momentum slows, revisions turn down, or the stretched multiple de-rates.

thesis: Dominant decorative-paints franchise where revisions have turned strongly up even as price lagged; a recovery-plus-revision setup.
falsification: Competitive intensity (new entrants) keeps margins under pressure and revisions reverse back down.

thesis: Beauty/fashion e-commerce platform with strongly rising revisions as profitability improves; small high-growth position.
falsification: Take-rate/margin progress stalls, competition intensifies and revisions turn down.

thesis: High-growth IT services name with strongly rising revisions; a contrarian IT pick where analysts are upgrading into price weakness.
falsification: Deal momentum slows, US discretionary IT spend weakens and revisions reverse.

thesis: Structural horizontal e-commerce platform; keep as a meaningful but de-sized position given only neutral revisions and rich valuation.
falsification: GMV/monetization growth stalls or path-to-profit slips, with revisions turning down.

thesis: Category-leading eyewear retailer with strongly rising revisions and good momentum; structural consumption growth.
falsification: Store-economics/unit-growth disappoints and revisions reverse.

thesis: Best-in-class value retailer; structural compounder held as defensive consumption exposure.
falsification: Like-for-like growth and margins compress under online grocery competition; revisions turn down.

thesis: PepsiCo-bottler structural growth story with international expansion; quality consumption name.
falsification: Volume growth slows, new-geography losses widen and revisions turn negative.

thesis: Telecom duopoly beneficiary with ARPU-led free-cash growth; structural large-cap ballast.
falsification: Tariff war resumes or revisions deteriorate alongside falling momentum.

thesis: Diversified conglomerate with retail/Jio value-unlock optionality; index-weight ballast for a benchmark-aware hybrid.
falsification: Energy margins compress and retail/telecom value-unlock stalls while revisions stay negative.

thesis: Highest-quality large private bank by execution; core financials franchise holding.
falsification: Asset quality deteriorates or NIMs compress sharply and revisions turn clearly negative.

thesis: Largest PSU bank, cheap on book, leveraged to credit growth; value anchor in financials.
falsification: Credit costs rise, revisions turn down further and the cheapness fails to re-rate.

thesis: Premier private bank with normalizing post-merger metrics; retained at a reduced weight pending a revision turn.
falsification: Revisions and momentum turn decisively positive, proving the de-size wrong.

thesis: Conservative high-quality private bank; held at a reduced weight given lacklustre revisions.
falsification: NIM expansion and loan growth re-accelerate with revisions turning up.

thesis: Premier consumer-lending franchise with durable AUM growth; structural compounder.
falsification: Asset quality stress emerges or growth slows and revisions deteriorate.

thesis: Tier-1 IT services franchise held at reduced weight; lower conviction than the re-accelerating COFORGE.
falsification: Discretionary IT spend recovers, revisions turn up and large-cap IT outperforms mid-cap IT.

thesis: Highest-quality IT franchise held at a trimmed weight; ballast within technology.
falsification: Revisions and momentum both deteriorate, signalling a deeper IT-spend downturn.

thesis: Integrated steel producer held at reduced weight; lower-conviction metals exposure than the rising-revision miners.
falsification: Steel spreads widen and revisions turn up, making the trim premature.

thesis: Regulated-return power utility with capacity growth; defensive yield ballast at a trimmed weight.
falsification: Capex execution slips or revisions deteriorate while bond yields rise.

thesis: Diversified FMCG/cigarettes cash-generator held at a reduced defensive weight.
falsification: FMCG margins and revisions turn up, or a value-unlock catalyst emerges.

thesis: Leading realty developer held at reduced weight as the residential up-cycle matures.
falsification: Pre-sales re-accelerate and revisions turn positive, making the trim wrong.

thesis: Value-retail roll-up with structural store growth; small consumption position.
falsification: Same-store-sales growth slows and revisions deteriorate.

thesis: Private bank where revisions have turned up off a low base; small tactical recovery position diversifying the bank sleeve.
falsification: Asset-quality or microfinance stress re-emerges and revisions reverse down.

thesis: Diversified resources name with very strong momentum and rising revisions; small high-beta commodity tilt.
falsification: Commodity prices fall, momentum reverses or leverage/governance concerns resurface.
